headline: Budget 2026 Allocates RM303B Amid Fiscal Squeeze
context: Finance Minister Anwar Ibrahim tabled Budget 2026 in October 2025 with a RM303 billion allocation, the largest in Malaysian history, while targeting a fiscal deficit of 3.8% of GDP.

cards.big: RM303 billion is Malaysia's biggest budget ever — but the deficit still sits at 3.8%
cards.sub: Record spending meets persistent structural shortfalls in revenue collection

cards.big: Government revenue covers only 82% of operating expenditure before development spending begins
cards.sub: Tax base remains narrow — only 15% of workforce pays income tax directly

cards.big: B40 households receive RM4.7 billion in direct cash transfers under SARA 2026
cards.sub: Critics question whether cash handouts address root causes of poverty

cards.big: Auditor General flagged RM2.1 billion in 2024 procurement irregularities across 14 ministries
cards.sub: Budget expansion without audit reform risks amplifying existing leakages

cards.big: A record budget means nothing if the money leaks through the same old cracks in the system
Should Malaysia cap annual budget growth until audit compliance hits 95% across ministries?
